# Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/), version 2.1.

By participating in this project (as a contributor, maintainer, issue reporter, or commenter), you agree to abide by its terms.

## Reporting

Report concerns privately to the project maintainer:

- Email: ozcanorhandem@gmail.com

All reports are handled confidentially. You can expect an initial response within 7 days. Where the report concerns the maintainer directly, please indicate that in the subject line so the report can be routed to a neutral reviewer.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies in all project spaces (issues, pull requests, code review comments, discussions) and in public spaces when an individual is representing the project.

## Enforcement

The maintainer is responsible for clarifying and enforcing standards. Possible responses include a private warning, a public correction, a temporary ban, or a permanent ban, applied proportionately to the violation.
